title: Create In Me

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Wash me clean of all my shadows
Like the morning washes dew
I've walked so far from grace and mercy
Now I'm finding my way back to You

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Create in me a heart that's pure
Like silver flowing through the fire
Restore the joy I knew before
Lift me from these depths higher
Create in me something new

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Every night I face my failures
Every morning seek Your face
The truth cuts deeper than the darkness
But Your love flows deeper still with grace

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Create in me a heart that's pure
Like silver flowing through the fire
Restore the joy I knew before
Lift me from these depths higher
Create in me something new
[BRIDGE] I'll teach the lost ones how to find You Show them paths through wilderness My voice will rise in honest worship When You free me from this heaviness
[VERSE 3] Let my spirit dance with freedom Let my praise break through these walls The sacrifice You truly seek is Just this broken heart that calls

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Create in me a heart that's pure
Like silver flowing through the fire
Restore the joy I knew before
Lift me from these depths higher
Create in me something new

[FINAL CHORUS] Create in me a heart that's pure Like silver flowing through the fire Restore the joy I knew before Lift me from these depths higher Create in me Create in me Create in me something new

epigraph: Create in me a clean heart
